notes: For classes-and-instances, attributes-and-init, and methods-and-self, prefer recipeType semantic instead of fixed_tests.
Use semantic class/object checks such as defines_class, constructible, instance_attributes, and method_returns for class behavior tasks.
Treat create-an-instance-and-call-a-method exercises as semantic class behavior checks too, even if the prompt mentions printing the result.
Do not wrap class-return or method-return tasks in stdin/stdout harness code.
Do not expose helper harness code such as ast.literal_eval, _parse_arg, or hidden parser utilities in starterCode or solutionCode.
